demographics.living_situation: lives independently at a private residence

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My big toe is throbbing so badly I can't even let the bedsheets touch it, and I absolutely cannot put a work boot on. It's been getting worse for weeks and now there's pus coming out of the side of the nail.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The pain has become unbearable over the last day or two, there's yellow discharge and a lump of raw flesh growing over the edge of the nail, and I can't wear shoes or get to work.

symptom_narrative.onset: the toenail has been troublesome for weeks; the redness and swelling have built up over about three weeks and it got much worse in the last 48 hours
symptom_narrative.duration: roughly three weeks, sharply worse in the last two days
symptom_narrative.character: severe throbbing pain at the side of the big-toe nail, with the corner of the nail feeling like it is digging into the skin
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: so painful I can't bear anything touching it, not even a bedsheet
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the outer edge of the nail on my right big toe
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant now, worse with any pressure
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: keeping all pressure off it and going barefoot or in an open sandal
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: putting on a closed shoe or work boot, or anything pressing on the toe
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: yellow pus coming from the side of the nail and a small lump of raw red flesh that bleeds easily where the nail meets the skin
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: the nail has caught and been sore on and off before but never this bad
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: walking with a limp, completely unable to wear closed footwear or go to work

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: recurring ingrown toenail on the same toe

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: works a job that requires closed steel-cap boots; cannot currently work because of the toe

objective_data_offered.value: on video the side of the right big-toe nail looks red and swollen with a small amount of yellow discharge, and there is a raised lump of red tissue at the nail edge that looks like it bleeds easily
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-held phone video in variable lighting; the doctor cannot palpate, probe the nail fold, or assess depth of penetration remotely

objective_data_offered.value: no fever measured at home; says he does not feel hot or shivery
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-report, no home thermometer reading provided
